title: Traditional Turkish-Style Lahmacun
description: A classic Turkish dish, this lahmacun is topped with spiced lamb and onions, perfect as a snack or light meal.
instructions: Roll out the lahmacun dough to a thickness of about 3mm.
Spread the lamb mince evenly over the dough, leaving a 2cm border around the edges.
Sprinkle the parsley, salt, and black pepper over the lamb.
Bake the lahmacun in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Remove the lahmacun from the oven and brush with lemon juice.
Sprinkle the Turkish spice mix over the top.
Return the lahmacun to the oven and bake for a further 2-3 minutes, or until the spices are fragrant.
Remove the lahmacun from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Slice the lahmacun into wedges and serve hot.
